name: Hellish Rebuke
description: You point your finger, and the creature that damaged you is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames. The creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 2d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
notes: Range: D&D 5e 60 ft; 2 grid for L1 range balance.
Reaction trigger (when damaged) requires a reaction-trigger engine mechanic — see proposals.
Mana 2: reaction fire — the reaction-cost and limited trigger window already constrain power significantly.
Ash×1 (fire domain, 15gp, no focus provides ash — always consumed). Sulfur (500gp) stripped from stub as Fireball-tier on a L1 reaction. Arcane-powder also stripped (arcane domain, wrong theme).

material_component.focus_provided: No focus provides ash — always consumed.
